SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF DANNY ARVEY SOSA CHAN APPEARED, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER VICTOR MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NERY GOMEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
